Event: Autumn Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: BK16
Smoke Cloud Book

Once in a while, the unit turns 3 random enemy units into a rock for 4 sec. The targets can't move and take 45% more damage. The targets also take 480000 magic damage every second for the duration.
When the effect runs out, the targets explode. The explosion deals 535000 pure damage to the target, and their physical and magic armor are reduced by 30% for 3 sec. 3 nearby enemies are hit by rocks. The rocks deal 400000 physical damage on impact and stun the targets for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
